name: Tracotucotulu Delapeladustuz
lore:
Lore of Tracotucotulu Delapeladustuz
                                    


Tracotucotulu Delapeladustuz is a Volkswagen Beetle Camel, which combines a camel and a car (Volkswagen Beetle).
Lyrics
Original language (Spanish): Tracotucotulu Delapeladustuz. ¿Que hermoso era? Tralalero Ralala. Camello camello dios de los cerdos. Hacía sus hazañas en su pequeña residencia en el desierto del Sahara, toma el tuyo punto, vehículo de motor punto de alto nivel para ir a tomarte al café "Trulimero Trulichina".
English: Tracotucotulu Delapeladustuz. How beautiful was he? Tralalero Ralala, camel camel god of pigs. He performed his feats in his small residence in the Sahara Desert, take yours, motor vehicle point high-level point to go and have a drink at the "Trulimero Trulichina" café.
